text: Hey guys, it's Dr. Mario Leyva. I have a quick video to show you. This video demonstrates the use of ICG.

It was specifically helpful in this video as this was a prior cholecystectomy patient who had a remnant gallbladder that was causing symptoms. The ICG Firefly was tremendously helpful in this case as the dissection was quite tedious.
I just recently found out there's actually several companies that have ICG capability. I've included those on this video.
Let me know what you think.
